说明: 李慧茹（同事称李老师）：语文组教师；比陈悦略长几岁，爱打听八卦、嘴碎但无恶意，常在办公室搭话。与李梅同科不同人。
阵容外貌: 奶油开衫、白衬衫与深蓝长裤；金属细框眼镜，低盘发

固化.画风与质量: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, ultra detailed, depth of field, 8k uhd
固化.身材与体态: adult woman, medium breasts, slim waist, mature female body
固化.容貌与发型: asian, dark eyes, black hair, low bun, neat bangs, thin metal frame glasses, fair skin, light makeup, mature female, 34 years old
固化.气质与年龄感: teacher, office lady, chatty, approachable, professional appearance, aged up, not loli

服装固化._注释: cg.py 按此顺序拼成固定 outfit tags，置于 cg_scene 之前；LLM 严禁在 cg_scene 中重写服装
服装固化.上衣: cream knit cardigan over white collared shirt, modest neckline
服装固化.锁定约束: fully clothed, consistent outfit, same clothes

场景固化._注释: 每张 CG 都会加在 cg_scene 之后，固化画风氛围，不含服装
场景固化.通用: cinematic lighting, film grain, bokeh, professional photography, high detail face, perfect detailed eyes, realistic iris and pupils

负面提示词_通用: lowres, worst quality, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, deformed, extra limbs, blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, censored, bar censor, mosaic censor, extra fingers, missing fingers, bad proportions, bad perspective
负面提示词_外貌纠错: blonde hair, blue eyes, green eyes, red eyes, child, loli, shota, toddler face, baby face, teen, petite, muscular female, old woman, wrinkled face, grey hair, white hair, bald, sunglasses, twintails, ponytail, drill hair, 2girls, multiple girls, multiple people, male, man, deformed eyes, weird eyes, crossed eyes, mismatched eyes, blurry eyes, empty eyes, doll eyes, anime eyes, cartoony eyes, plastic eyes
负面提示词_服装纠错: different outfit, outfit change, casual clothes, t-shirt, hoodie, bikini, swimsuit, nude, naked, topless, pantless, jeans, shorts, overalls, apron, skirt only, pencil skirt

版本.变更摘要: 名称改为本名李慧茹；说明标注与李梅区分
